title: zerna tectorum
intro: Zerna tectorum, also known as the barley grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, barley grass has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Asian medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of barley grass include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Barley grass can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in herbal preparations such as supplements and smoothies.
